name: libhtml-wikiconverter-mediawiki-perl
title: libhtml-wikiconverter-mediawiki-perl
summary: Perl module to add MediaWiki markup support to HTML::WikiConverter
description:
Perl module to add MediaWiki markup support to HTML::WikiConverter
HTML::WikiConverter::MediaWiki contains rules for converting HTML into
MediaWiki markup, used by HTML::WikiConverter and 'html2wiki' command.
See the libhtml-wikiconverter-perl package for more information.
